data.content: Approved implementation review: loom update now resolves latest via GitHub release asset redirects, enforces the supported release matrix in both Rust and install.sh, verifies checksums before atomic self-replacement, documents the new UX, and includes unit plus integration coverage for target mapping, redirect tag parsing, --check, no-op, --force, and unsupported targets. Read-only review of commit 3cbe24d66c40 found no invariant violations or acceptance-criteria drift. Sanity gates passed against an exported snapshot of that commit: cargo fmt --all --check, cargo test, and cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings.
